title: PIL before Kerala High Court against award of Padma Bhushan to Vellappally Natesan
description: A public interest litigation (PIL) petition has been filed before the Kerala High Court challenging the decision to award the Padma Bhushan to Vellappally Natesan [Sree Narayana Dharmaprabodhana Samrakshna Samithi v. Union of India & Ors.]Natesan was the General Secretary of the Sree Narayana Dharma Paripalana Yogam (SNDP Yogam), a non-trading company established with the objective of uplifting the Ezhava community in Kerala. However, earlier today, a single-judge Bench of the High Court ord
